versions.changelog_entry: Initial release. Mintlify setup for developer / component documentation only — explicitly NOT a replacement for the Quarto-rendered bound forensic report. Scope boundary stated up front and reinforced throughout the prompt: quarto.yml, index.qmd, notebooks/, data/reports/, and .github/workflows/deploy.yml are out of scope and must be byte-identical pre/post task. Nine steps covering: create mintlify/ at repo root with full docs.json navigation tree (tabs for Get Started, Components, Operations, Decision Records, Prompts), build scripts/build_mintlify_content.py that derives MDX from docs/ and prompts/ (single source of truth preserved), hand-author introduction/quickstart/architecture pages with cross-link Note to Quarto report, follow a consistent component-page template (CardGroup source-and-test links, ParamField inputs/outputs, CodeGroup config examples, AccordionGroup methods), local dev via mint dev, deploy via Mintlify hosted with content directory set to mintlify/, add .github/workflows/mintlify-lint.yml separate from deploy.yml. 10 acceptance criteria including a Quarto-invariants check via git diff --stat. Verification commands enforce reproducibility and broken-link cleanliness. Rollback leaves Quarto deploy as safety net.
